summary: Completed testing of reported bugs: 1) Adding ideas on Pomysły page - FIXED, 2) Sync functionality on Wyniki page - FIXED, 3) Shop selector UX improvement - FIXED. All 3 user-reported issues have been resolved.
passed_tests: Login with PIN 2409 - works correctly (PIN pad UI)
Ideas list displays with filter tabs (Wszystkie, Ważne, Produkt, Marketing, Sklep, Inne)
Add new idea dialog opens via 'Nowy' button
Add idea form has: Title, Description, Link, Category dropdown, Priority star
Creating new idea works - 'Pomysł dodany!' toast shown
Shop selector dropdown in header - shows 'Wszystkie sklepy'
Shop tabs visible (Wszystkie, ecom1, ecom2, ecom3, ecom4)
Sync/Refresh button works - 'Dane odświeżone!' toast shown
All KPI cards visible (Przychód, Netto, Koszty, Dochód, Na łeb)
Financial data table shows days with '+' buttons for income/costs
POST /api/ideas - creates idea successfully (no created_at field sent)
seed_data_creation: Test ideas created and deleted during testing (TEST_Playwright_Idea_*, TEST_Idea_2026)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 user-reported issues have been fixed: 1) Ideas page now allows adding ideas without error - the fix removed sending created_at from frontend, 2) Sync button on Wyniki page now calls api.syncAll() correctly and shows 'Dane odświeżone!' message, 3) Shop selector dropdown added to Wyniki header with quick shop tabs below for easier shop switching.

issue_1.description: Błąd dodawania pomysłów na stronie Pomysły
issue_1.verification: Added new idea via UI - 'Pomysł dodany!' toast displayed, idea appears in list

issue_2.verification: Clicked sync button - 'Dane odświeżone!' toast displayed, syncData function calls api.syncAll()

issue_3.description: Potrzeba poprawy UI/UX - łatwiejszy wybór sklepu
issue_3.verification: Shop dropdown in header works, quick shop tabs (Wszystkie, ecom1-4) visible and functional
